diagrams.title: Reference Variable Memory Layout
diagrams.description: Shows how reference variables and objects are stored in Stack and Heap memory
diagrams.purpose: Understand that references store addresses, not objects

diagrams.title: Reference Assignment Diagram
diagrams.description: Visualizes the before and after state of reference assignment
elements: Both A and B pointing to same Object
diagrams.purpose: Comprehend that assignment copies reference, not object

diagrams.title: Shallow vs Deep Copy Comparison
diagrams.description: Contrasts shallow copy and deep copy memory layouts
diagrams.purpose: Distinguish between shallow and deep copying mechanisms
